name_en: Bottega Veneta Python Jodie. Rare skin bags can be hard to style, but simple clothes actually highlight the natural wild beauty of the bag. As a classic BV model, this Python version breaks the original cute and sweet style. The designer's bold attempt has created a different kind of beauty. The spirit of the python represents power and mystery, corresponding to the independent and strong qualities of modern women.
